title: Human induced pluripotent stem cell culture
steps: Coat 6 well plates with Geltrex LDEV-Free Reduced Growth Factor Basement Membrane Matrix (Thermo Fisher Scientific), 1:100 dilution for 1 hour before cell passaging.
When hiPSCs are 80-90% confluent, they are passaged:
Old media is aspirated and replaced with 1ml of cell-culture PBS (Gibco, Thermo Fisher Scientific)
PBS is aspirated and replaced with 0.5 mM EDTA (Thermo Fisher Scientific) made up in PBS.
hiPSC are incubated in EDTA for 00:05:00 at 37 °C .
After 5 minutes, the EDTA is aspirated and cells are dissociated with media (E8 or mTesR 1).
hiPSCs are then placed in new 6 well plates at the desired dilution.
All hiPSCs are fed daily with fresh media. All cells were maintained at 37°C and 5% carbon dioxide.
creator: gurvir.virdi
